formName: Land Information - Provincial Crown Affected Land Details
formDescription: This section is used to provide details about land parcels categorized as 'Provincial Crown' that are physically affected by the works. It collects ownership information, physical location descriptions, and formal legal identifiers.

LandOwnershipCategory.title: What is the category of land ownership?
LandOwnershipCategory.description: Classification of the land ownership (Private, Provincial Crown, or Other).

LandOwnerAffected.title: Name of owner of land that is affected by your works:
LandOwnerAffected.description: Full legal name of the owner of the affected land parcel.

CivicAddressOther.title: Civic address or other location description of affected land:
CivicAddressOther.description: The street address or physical description identifying the location of the land.

LegalDescription.title: Legal Description:
LegalDescription.description: The formal legal description of the property as it appears on the Land Title.

MetesAndBounds.title: Metes and Bounds (description of unsurveyed land):
MetesAndBounds.description: A technical description of the boundaries for land that has not been formally surveyed.

CertificateOfTitleNo.title: Certificate of Title No:
CertificateOfTitleNo.description: The unique number identifying the Certificate of Title for this parcel.
